text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today is the spring Tenno Sho, a race where all
the mightiest senior-year racers gather.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I've had fans calling out to me all day!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: It's gotten me all pumped up and ready to go!
choice_data_list: You look like you could dash at any moment.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
It's a senior race and I'm up against McQueen, but
that doesn't matter! Either way, I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All shall witness the overwhelming strength of the
mighty Teio!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm off! You better be cheering for me,
Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Spectator A
text_block_list.text: Show them you're the best, McQueen!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Your fans are watching too, right? You can't let
them down.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Of course. I'm sure they'll be quite satisfied with
how this race turns out.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
(Well, too bad, because I'm ready to rock! There's
no way I'll lose!)
